title: pleomele humilis
intro: Pleomele humilis, also known as the Hawaiian heliconia or red beak-plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Hawaiian medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pleomele humilis are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of this plant include alleviating respiratory problems, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from stress and anxiety, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil for consumption and topical use.
